title: schinziella tetragona
intro: Schinziella tetragona, also known as Manketti or Marula plum, is a deciduous tree native to southern Africa, with edible fruits and medicinal properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Schinziella tetragona include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from the leaves, bark, and roots, which can be used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
